name: _DoIP_TCPDataInd
title: _DoIP_TCPDataInd
syntax: void _DoIP_TCPDataInd( BYTE DoIPVersion, WORD payloadType, BYTE pay-load[]);
description: A DoIP PDU was received from the connected peer that cannot be interpreted by this implementation.

parameters.name: DoIPVersion
parameters.description: Protocol version as sent in the header.
